overview: Siksha 'O' Anusandhan (SOA) University is a leading private multidisciplinary deemed-to-be university located in Bhubaneswar, Odisha. Known for its strong engineering, medical, dental, law, and management programs, SOA has established itself as a major academic and placement hub in eastern India with excellent industry connections and modern infrastructure.
accreditation: NAAC A++ Grade (3rd Cycle); Deemed-to-be University.

placements.avgSalary: ₹5.00 LPA – ₹6.00 LPA overall; CSE average: ₹6.50 LPA – ₹8.00 LPA
placements.medianSalary: UG 4-Year: ₹6.00 LPA (2024); PG 2-Year: ₹5.20 LPA; UG 5-Year: ~₹8.40 LPA
placements.totalOffers: 210+ companies visited during the latest placement cycle
placements.companiesVisited: Microsoft, Amazon, Deloitte, Accenture, Cognizant, Wipro, TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, IBM

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are based on SAAT (Siksha 'O' Anusandhan Admission Test) and national-level entrance examinations depending on the program.
admissions.importantDates: Admission schedules and counseling timelines are announced annually on the official SOA website.

campus.specialNote: One-time admission and caution fee ranges from ₹9,000 – ₹10,000. Hostel and mess charges together range between ₹90,000 and ₹1,70,000 annually depending on room type.

hostelAndMess.hostelFee: ₹50,000 – ₹1,25,000+ per year depending on AC/non-AC and sharing type

scholarships.entranceBased: Tuition fee waivers based on SAAT performance and academic merit.
meritScholarships: ₹35,000 scholarship for students scoring above 90% in 10th/12th
scholarships.phdStipend: Monthly stipend provided to selected full-time PhD scholars as per university norms.

contact.address: Siksha 'O' Anusandhan (SOA) University, Khandagiri Square, Bhubaneswar – 751030, Odisha, India
